<think> I need to identify the future Saturday Night Live star who was also in a sitcom from 1996-2001. I know that the question mentions the movie "Where's Poppa", but I'm not sure if that's relevant. I'll try to think of other information. I remember that there was a sitcom from 1996-2001 that had a cast member who went on to be a cast member on Saturday Night Live. I think the sitcom was "Friends" and one of its cast members, Matt LeBlanc, went on to be a cast member on SNL. However, I'm not sure if Matt LeBlanc was in "Where's Poppa". I'll keep thinking. Another sitcom that comes to mind is "Mad About You", but I'm not sure if any of its cast members went on to be on SNL. Wait, I remember that Paul Reiser was in "Mad About You" and also in "Where's Poppa". I think I have it! Paul Reiser was in "Where's Poppa" and also in "Mad About You" from 1996-2001. He was also a cast member on Saturday Night Live in the 1980s, but I'm not sure if he was a cast member during the 1996-2001 time period. However, I do know that he was a cast member on SNL from 1986-1988. I'm going to take a chance and say that the answer is Paul Reiser. </think>
<answer> Paul Reiser </answer>
